name: @innv0/innfo-mcp
description: MCP server wrapping @innv0/innfo-core — semantic iNNfo tools over stdio

scripts.deploy:cdn: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version; const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const cdnDir=path.resolve(process.cwd(),'../../docs/cdn'); fs.cpSync(path.join(process.cwd(),'bin/innfo-mcp.bundle.js'), path.join(cdnDir,'innfo-mcp-v'+v+'.bundle.js')); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(cdnDir,'manifest.json'), JSON.stringify({latest:'v'+v,updated:new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]},null,2)); console.log('CDN deployed: v'+v)"
